basic_details.job_title: CGPSC Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 46 Posts
basic_details.short_information: CGPSC Recruitment 2026 offers 46 new vacancies for Assistant Engineer posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech can apply online from 13-05-2026 to 11-06-2026 through the official CGPSC website, psc.cg.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Public Works Department (Civil); Public Works Department (Electrical/Mechanical); General Administration Department (Chief Technical Examiner - Vigilance)

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 500/- (Rupees Five Hundred only) - for corrections in gender, DOB, category, domicile, disability, ex-serviceman entries only

qualification.education_qualification: Relaxation equal to years of service rendered (max up to 45 years)

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Level-12: Rs. 56,100-1,77,500/- + DA and other allowances as per State Govt. orders

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official CGPSC portal www.psc.cg.gov.in. Manual or postal applications will not be accepted. The online portal will be active from 13-05-2026 (12:00 PM) to 11-06-2026 (11:59 PM).
seo_tags: Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026
